privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic bank transaction anomaly detection task with 287 total transactions generated from Q1 2024 (Jan 1-Mar 31, 2024) starting with $5,000 balance. Data includes 9 transaction categories with realistic amount ranges (e.g., Coffee $3-$15, Shopping $25-$300). The task plants anomalies at 18 specific data rows: 3 duplicate pairs (6 rows), 2 future-dated transactions (2025 and 2026), 1 ancient-dated transaction (2015-08-10), 4 statistical outliers with amounts 5x normal category max, 2 impossible amounts ($45,000 coffee and -$50 debit), and 3 balance calculation errors (+$500 discrepancies). Critical anomalies for verification are the 2 future dates, 2 impossible amounts, and first 4 duplicates (8 rows total). Pass threshold is 70% score, requiring detection of at least 12 anomaly rows (66.7% recall). DISCREPANCY FOUND: README claims 15 total anomalies, but code plants anomalies at 18 unique rows and verifier's feedback message refers to 15 anomalies when it should be 18. The 80% recall claim in README contradicts with the actual 12-anomaly threshold which equals 66.7% recall on 18 anomalies. Data is entirely synthetic, created with random seed 42 for reproducibility.
